intent: A debugging skill that refuses to patch before it understands — reproduces, isolates the true cause, and ships a regression test.

dimensions.name: iron-law
dimensions.criterion: States the governing rule: no fix without an investigation first.

dimensions.name: reproduce-first
dimensions.criterion: Requires a reliable reproduction before hypothesising.

dimensions.name: root-cause
dimensions.criterion: Chases the root cause, not the line that happens to throw.

dimensions.name: regression-test
dimensions.criterion: The fix ships with a regression test that fails before and passes after.
